title: Mission/vision (guiding_statements) grounding does not reach the IDEATION specs (milestones 03 / criteria 04 / actions 05)
description: guiding_statements (mission + vision clause atoms, populated + substantive in the dev DB) is in the grounding_sections of only narrative-draft(01), propose-responsibilities(07), propose-evidence(10), propose-accreditation-standards(13). It is ABSENT from the specs that IDEATE the plan's substance: propose-milestones(03), draft-success-criteria(04), decompose-action-steps(05). So per DEC-52, mission/vision are not ideation-input vectors where actions/milestones/criteria are generated -- the plan can't be ideated FROM the vision/mission, only narrative-framed by them upstream. Verified: the guiding_statements emitter (grounding.py _guiding_statements) carries {label,text} clause atoms and mission/vision are populated; the gap is grounding-REACH (which specs receive it) + the absence of any directive in 03/04/05 to ideate from it.

evidence.reference: guiding_statements in grounding_sections of narrative-draft/propose-responsibilities/propose-evidence/propose-accreditation-standards only; NOT in propose-milestones/draft-success-criteria/decompose-action-steps
_guiding_statements emits mission/vision clause atoms {label,text,order}; dev DB has both populated

impact: The plan's ideated substance (milestones, criteria, actions) is generated without the vision/mission in view, so the DEC-52 coherence requirement (visibly advancing-vision / vivifying-mission) cannot hold at the ideation layer. Compounds FGAP-029 (empty SLO descriptions) and DEC-51 (no per-actor SLO arcs).
proposed_resolution: Add guiding_statements to the grounding_sections of propose-milestones(03), draft-success-criteria(04), decompose-action-steps(05) (mind grounding-leanness / the stdout cap -- guiding_statements is small), and add directives in those specs to IDEATE from the vision/mission/SLO triad and make the advance-vision / vivify-mission / foster-SLO-progress coherence explicit. Folds into the DEC-51 multi-layer SLO-operationalization initiative.
